text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fully aware of the disadvantage she'll face due to
her size, Tamamo Cross takes on her first big
challenge of the Classic Triple Crown—the Satsuki
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rival of the day is Gold City. Tamamo Cross
might not hold a candle to her flashy looks, but
the real contest is the race ahead.
